title: matelea lasiostemma
intro: Matelea lasiostemma, also known as the "Antidote Plant", is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Matelea lasiostemma include its ability to alleviate muscle spasms, reduce pain, and lower blood pressure. Matelea lasiostemma can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
